Name: numpy
Author: NumPy Developers <numpy-discussion@python.org>
Description: Fundamental package for array computing in Python.
Maintainers (Active Last Yr?): mattip (Y), seberg (Y), charris (Y), rgommers (Y), stefanv (Y) + >100 others
Risk Analysis: Well-maintained, strong community, documented security process, audits performed. Low risk across all categories.

Name: typing-extensions
Author: Python Typing Team <typing-sig@python.org>
Description: Backported and experimental type hints for Python.
Risk Analysis: Core Python utility, actively maintained by Python core devs/typing team. Clear security policy via parent project. Low risk.

Name: sympy
Author: SymPy Development Team
Description: A Python library for symbolic mathematics.
Maintainers (Active Last Yr?): asmeurer (Y), oscarbenjamin (Y), sylee957 (Y), smichr (Y), czgdp1807 (Y) + >50 others
Risk Analysis: Large, active community, established project with security policy. Low risk.

Name: networkx
Author: NetworkX Developers <networkx-discuss@googlegroups.com>
Description: Python package for creating and manipulating graphs and networks.
Maintainers (Active Last Yr?): dschult (Y), jarrodmillman (Y), rossbar (Y), MridulS (Y), hagberg (N) + >20 others
Risk Analysis: Actively maintained community project with good practices and security reporting process. Low risk.

Name: jinja2
Author: Pallets <contact@palletsprojects.com>
Description: A modern and designer-friendly templating engine for Python.
Risk Analysis: Mature project under Pallets umbrella, good security posture. Sustainability rated Yellow due to small core maintainer team (bus factor).

Name: pyyaml
Author: Kirill Simonov <xi@resolvent.net>
Description: YAML parser and emitter for Python.
Maintainers (Active Last Yr?): yaml org (Y) - primarily fly-out, ingydotnet (Low recent activity)
Risk Analysis: Widely used but historically slow maintenance/patching. Relies heavily on underlying LibYAML. Lack of SECURITY.md. Moderate risk across categories due to maintenance concerns.

Name: filelock
Author: Benedikt Schmitt <benedikt@benediktschmitt.de>
Risk Analysis: Simple utility, seems stable. Maintained under tox-dev org but low activity. Unlicense adds minor ambiguity. Lack of SECURITY.md. Low-to-moderate risk.

Name: fsspec
Author: Martin Durant <mdurant@anaconda.com>
Description: Specification for Pythonic file system interfaces.
Risk Analysis: Actively developed, but governance seems centered around primary author/org. Lack of SECURITY.md. Low-to-moderate risk.

Name: nvidia-cudnn-cu12
Author: NVIDIA Corporation
Description: cuDNN native runtime libraries. (Bundled dependency via torch index)
Risk Analysis: Critical binary dependency. Closed source, maintained by NVIDIA. Risk stems from lack of transparency and reliance on vendor patching schedules. Sustainability is Green (large company).

Name: requests
Author: Python Software Foundation <security@python.org> (via psf)
Risk Analysis: Widely used, well-maintained under PSF, strong security practices. Low risk. (Assessed even if 'Devel' due to potential CI/CD impact).

Name: some-old-util
Author: Sole Maintainer <sole@example.com>
Risk Analysis: Example of a high-risk dependency: abandoned, sole inactive maintainer, unpatched vulnerability, no security process. High risk across all categories, even as a Devel dep.
